name: Lake, Field & Grain
note: Single source of truth for the RLC design system. Materialized 2026-07-17 from the v2.0 tokens spec; all derived artifacts (CSS, matplotlib, PptxGenJS, Excel, PowerBI) should generate from this file. Semantic rule: 'Lake asserts, Field signals, Wheat lights.'

lake.role: Anchor — body text, mastheads, dark surfaces, table headers, chart base paths

field.role: Accent — section rules, signal chips, positive values, chart accents, the horizon

wheat.role: Light — highlights on dark, horizon hairline, callout borders; never meaning alone

horizon_band.description: Signature motif — replaces all plain gold rules. Lake asserts, Field signals, Wheat lights.
horizon_band.orientation: grounded — Wheat light hairline on TOP, Paper gap, Field band on BOTTOM. Reads as a true horizon (land grounded, light above). Ruled by Tore 2026-07-18; supersedes the v2.0 field-on-top order in the source PDF's PptxGenJS/matplotlib snippets.

typography.web_fallback_note: Georgia and Calibri are system-safe on Windows/Office; on web where unavailable, fall back to a serif (display) / humanist sans (text) pairing.

excel.model_conventions: blue inputs, black formulas, green cross-sheet links (unchanged)
